name: Seller Assistant
description: Seller assistant tools for pricing, RFQ replies, inventory checks, and campaign planning.

currency.description: Display currency fallback used when a tool output does not have an explicit business currency from source data, such as quote drafts or manual-input planning contexts.

locale.description: Display locale used for formatted tool output.

targetMarginFloorPct.description: Optional configured margin floor percentage used for quote guardrails and campaign margin buffer calculations.

lowInventoryDays.description: Inventory days-of-cover threshold that triggers low-stock warnings.

supplierLeadDays.description: Shared supplier lead time in days used by restock checks when the user does not provide one.

safetyStockDays.description: Shared safety stock buffer in days used by restock checks when the user does not provide one.

salesLookbackDays.description: Shared lookback window in days used to estimate average daily sales for Shopify-backed restock checks.

responseTone.description: Shared response tone for seller-facing draft outputs.

defaultStoreId.description: Store profile to use when the user does not specify a store.

stores.description: Configured seller stores grouped by platform.

id.description: Local identifier for this Shopify store profile.

name.description: Display name for this Shopify store profile.

storeDomain.description: The merchant-owned *.myshopify.com store domain where the merchant's own Shopify app is installed.

clientId.description: Client id of the merchant-owned Shopify app used for this store. This plugin does not provide a shared public Shopify app.

clientSecretEnv.description: Environment variable name on the OpenClaw host that contains the merchant-owned Shopify app client secret.

supplierLeadDays.description: Optional store-level supplier lead time override in days. If omitted, fall back to the plugin-level supplierLeadDays.

safetyStockDays.description: Optional store-level safety stock override in days. If omitted, fall back to the plugin-level safetyStockDays.

salesLookbackDays.description: Optional store-level sales lookback override in days. If omitted, fall back to the plugin-level salesLookbackDays.
